project.name: InvoiceIQ
project.description: AI-powered invoice processing SaaS — upload PDF/image, Gemini Vision extracts data, export to CSV/accounting

stack.export: CSV + REST webhook to accounting APIs

prompts.title: InvoiceUploader
prompts.pdd_reason: Drag-and-drop file upload for PDF/image invoices with validation and upload progress.
prompts.prompt:
% You are an expert React engineer.
% Create an <InvoiceUploader /> component for an invoice processing SaaS.

<include>context/frontend_preamble.prompt</include>

% Requirements
1. Props: onUpload(file: File) callback — no internal fetch
2. Accept: PDF and image files only (pdf, png, jpg, jpeg, tiff)
3. Drag-and-drop zone + click-to-browse fallback
4. Show file name, size, and type badge after selection
5. Validate file size <= 10MB; show inline error if exceeded
6. Show upload progress bar (0–100%) via onProgress prop
7. Reject multiple files — single invoice per upload

prompts.title: ExtractionReviewer
prompts.pdd_reason: Editable review panel for Gemini-extracted invoice fields before export — shows confidence scores.
prompts.prompt:
% You are an expert React engineer.
% Create an <ExtractionReviewer /> component for reviewing AI-extracted invoice data.

<include>context/frontend_preamble.prompt</include>

<invoice_uploader_example>
<include>examples/invoice_uploader_example.jsx</include>
</invoice_uploader_example>

% Requirements
1. Props: extraction (InvoiceExtraction), onConfirm(edited: InvoiceExtraction), onReject()
2. Display fields: vendor_name, invoice_number, invoice_date, due_date, subtotal, tax, total
3. Each field shows Gemini confidence score (0.0–1.0) as a color-coded badge (green/yellow/red)
4. All fields are editable inline — user can correct Gemini mistakes before export
5. Line items table: description, quantity, unit_price, amount — editable rows
6. Confirm and Reject action buttons at the bottom
7. Fields with confidence < 0.7 are highlighted as needing review

prompts.title: InvoiceDashboard
prompts.pdd_reason: Main dashboard listing all processed invoices with status, totals, and export controls.
prompts.prompt:
% You are an expert React engineer.
% Create an <InvoiceDashboard /> main dashboard component.

<include>context/frontend_preamble.prompt</include>

<extraction_reviewer_example>
<include>examples/extraction_reviewer_example.jsx</include>
</extraction_reviewer_example>

% Requirements
1. Fetch GET /api/invoices on mount; show loading skeleton
2. Table: invoice_number, vendor_name, invoice_date, total, status badge, actions
3. Status values: pending | extracted | reviewed | exported — color-coded badges
4. Row actions: View (open ExtractionReviewer), Export CSV, Delete
5. Bulk export: checkbox selection + Export Selected button
6. Summary cards at top: total invoices, total value, pending review count
7. Filter by status; sort by date or total

prompts.title: extraction_endpoint
prompts.pdd_reason: POST /api/extract — receives PDF/image, calls Gemini Vision for multimodal extraction, returns structured InvoiceExtraction.
prompts.prompt:
% You are an expert Python/FastAPI engineer.
% Implement POST /api/extract — Gemini Vision invoice extraction endpoint.

<include>context/python_preamble.prompt</include>

<gemini_service>
<include>examples/gemini_service_example.py</include>
</gemini_service>

<db_models>
<include>examples/db_models_example.py</include>
</db_models>

% Requirements
1. Accept multipart/form-data with a single file field (PDF or image)
2. Validate: file type must be pdf/png/jpg/jpeg/tiff; size <= 10MB; raise HTTP 422 otherwise
3. Convert PDF pages to images if needed (first page only for v1)
4. Call Gemini 1.5 Flash with the image bytes — multimodal prompt for extraction
5. Parse Gemini response into InvoiceExtraction(vendor_name, invoice_number,
   invoice_date, due_date, subtotal, tax, total, line_items[], confidence_scores{})
6. Persist record with status='extracted' and return InvoiceExtraction
7. Timeout: 30s; raise HTTP 504 on breach. All I/O async.
what_NOT_in_prompt: PDF-to-image conversion implementation (grounding handles pdf2image pattern)
Gemini API call syntax (grounding from gemini_service example)

prompts.title: gemini_service
prompts.pdd_reason: Shared Gemini Vision service — encapsulates API key, model config, multimodal invocation, and structured JSON parsing.
prompts.prompt:
% You are an expert Python engineer.
% Implement the Gemini Vision service for invoice extraction.

<include>context/python_preamble.prompt</include>

% Requirements
1. Function: extract_invoice(image_bytes, mime_type) -> dict
2. Use google-generativeai SDK; model = gemini-1.5-flash
3. Send image bytes as inline_data with the extraction prompt
4. Extraction prompt instructs Gemini to return ONLY valid JSON with fields:
   vendor_name, invoice_number, invoice_date, due_date, subtotal, tax,
   total, currency, line_items[], confidence_scores{}
5. Parse and validate JSON response; raise ExtractionError on parse failure
6. Accept gemini_client as constructor parameter (dependency injection for testability)
7. Never log API keys; log only model name and token count at DEBUG level

prompts.title: export_endpoint
prompts.pdd_reason: POST /api/export — exports reviewed invoices to CSV file or webhook to accounting system.
prompts.prompt:
% You are an expert Python/FastAPI engineer.
% Implement invoice export to CSV and accounting webhook.

<include>context/python_preamble.prompt</include>

<db_models>
<include>examples/db_models_example.py</include>
</db_models>

% Requirements
1. POST /api/export/csv: accept ExportRequest(invoice_ids: list[UUID])
   — fetch invoices, serialize to CSV, return as StreamingResponse
2. CSV columns: invoice_number, vendor_name, invoice_date, due_date,
   subtotal, tax, total, currency, line_items (JSON string), status
3. POST /api/export/webhook: POST each invoice as JSON to ACCOUNTING_WEBHOOK_URL env var
4. Webhook payload matches QuickBooks Online invoice import schema
5. Mark exported invoices with status='exported' and exported_at timestamp
6. Return WebhookResult(success_count, failed_ids, errors) for webhook export
what_NOT_in_prompt: CSV serialization implementation (grounding handles csv.DictWriter pattern)
HTTP client for webhook (preamble provides httpx async)
